mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: Null Hypothesis H0 is the status quo you hope to O-verthrow (like zero effect). Alternative Hypothesis H1 is the new idea you hope is 1-for-1 true.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: The null hypothesis (H0) represents a statement of 'no effect' or 'no difference'.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: The significance level (alpha, α) is the probability of rejecting the null hypothesis when it is actually true (Type I error).

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: The p-value is the probability of obtaining test results at least as extreme as the observed results, assuming that the null hypothesis is correct.
